top_signals.title: Pentagon’s push to field weapons faster risks outrunning its own oversight, watchdog finds
top_signals.summary: Workforce reductions meant that weapon systems reach warfighters with “undocumented shortfalls related to effectiveness, suitability, [and] survivability."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S., Iran talks conclude in Doha, focused on Strait
top_signals.summary: Sources said the two ‌countries discussed the Strait of Hormuz and financial incentives ​for Iran, two pillars of the initial agreement they signed in June.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
